title: drop schema crashes server
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
CREATE VIEW test_schema.test_view AS SELECT * FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: dropping schema with existing views causes server crash
